creator: marcin@mankament.pl
text:
When I tried to boot my machine from freebsd 6.2, 6.3 bootonly CD, booting
process stop at: 

ips0: adapter type: ServeRAID 6M (marco)
ips0: logical drives: 1
ips0: Logical Drive 0: Raid5 sectors 284385280, state OK
ipsd0: <Logical Drive> on ips0
ipsd0: Logical Drive (138860MB)

But when I tried to boot from 6.1 system works ok. Even I tried to cvsup
kernel sources from 6.2, 6.3 but result whas the same. It's very painful
thing for me beacuse I need to use security event auditing. 

I gave you in attachment my kernel config which works on fbsd 6.1, and
output from dmidecode.

Fix: Patch attached with submission follows:
